free_text: Total Neutron Cross Section of Technetium-99 from 0.01
Corrected for sample contaminants: aluminum, oxygen,
Converted to new date formats, lower case.
From fit to total between 0.02 and 0.03 eV.
Data taken from text of reference.
No information on source of uncertainties.
Data taken from Table II of reference.
Note added from the ENDF/B-VII.0 evaluator:
These data seem  too low, as notice in the publication
mainly because of the water contamination.
